what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record that declares a typed link between a channel and a board item.
observations: Contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
standouts: target is a board:// URI pointing to item-9febd1ed
conventions: Follows YAML frontmatter convention with --- delimiters
Uses kebab-case id and ISO 8601 timestamp
Uses a custom board:// URI scheme for cross-entity referencing
concerns: File contains no explanatory body or context beyond the metadata link
The referenced board item content is not present in this file
notes: A minimal, timestamped ledger entry that ties a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What does board item item-9febd1ed represent?
Why was this board item attached to dragnet-development?
Is this attachment active, historical, or pending?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as an attachment record matches what it does: it records a channel-to-board-item link.
intention_signals: It appears designed to create a durable, queryable record that a specific board item is relevant to the dragnet-development channel.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme in the target field to reference an external board entity.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed association between a channel and a board item that a fused system could use to reconstruct linkage history.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record with id att-b7a41ae4 linking dragnet-development channel to board item item-9febd1ed via a board:// URI, recorded on 2026-06-24.
